case_title: JIMMIE TILLERY VS. PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TILLERY, JIMMIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JANET YACOUB--BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TILLERY, JIMMIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISE LINES LTD (DBA PRINCESS CRUISES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
